events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks the birthday of the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have been 63.

angles.name: Tribute to George Michael
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His incredible voice and songwriting continue to inspire.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: It's 17 years since the world lost the 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, who passed away on this day in 2009 at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering Michael Jackson
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and legacy continue to reign supreme.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Happy 86th birthday to legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr!

angles.name: Ringo's 86th Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday Shred
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, turns 83 today.

angles.name: Jagger's 83rd Birthday
angles.copy: Still rocking at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy birthday, MTV! Forty-five years ago today, a channel launched that changed music forever. What was the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring hits like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh as ever, doesn't it?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music. Happy anniversary, Woodstock!

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: It's 49 years since the world said goodbye to the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the music world lost a legend. Remembering Elvis Presley and his timeless impact.

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot dead in 1996
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, the influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot dead in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who was tragically taken from us on this day in 1996. His music and message live on.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 83
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 83.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 83 today. His guitar mastery remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969, featuring timeless tracks and that famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to rock icon Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam's 54th Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune from the Burnage legend?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' in 1975
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago today, John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with so much power and hope.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple introduced the first iPod, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first time you put 1,000 songs in your pocket? Happy 25th anniversary to the original iPod, released today!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite 007 theme tune of all time?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks the birthday of The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have been 86.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.
